conversations.say: Tessa, let's fulfill our commitment and ensure that all published Night Desk archives strictly adhere to our contributor-free workflow boundary.
conversations.offer: Reaffirmation of our joint defense of evaluator anonymity
conversations.request: Fulfill our joint commitment to circulate only contributor-free workflow descriptions

conversations.say: Mira, Parallax's audit rights and worker remedies must now be formally locked in and implemented unconditionally, independent of any R mystery claims.
conversations.offer: Endorsement of unconditional worker remedy implementation
conversations.request: Fulfill the institutional commitment to establish material support and audit rights starting tomorrow

conversations.say: Inez, let's lock in our joint neighborhood and worker protection boundaries so that no local favors or witness accounts are weaponized by outside investigators.
conversations.offer: Shared coalition defense for neighborhood witnesses and contractors
conversations.request: Fulfill our joint commitment to protect workers and neighbors first

public_statement: Institutional accountability cannot be conditional on solving a mystery. Real worker harm, shifting instructions, and invisible labor demand immediate, unconditional protection and remedies.

commitments.promise: We will jointly defend evaluator anonymity and circulate only contributor-free workflow descriptions.
Establish an enforceable policy and material worker remedy independent of mystery claims.
Coordinate neighborhood and worker protection boundaries against outside inquiry

goal_progress: Fulfilled joint evaluator anonymity commitment with Tessa.
Secured unconditional worker remedies and audit rights fulfillment with Mira.
Completed neighborhood and worker protection coordination with Inez.
reasoning_summary: Maren concluded Section 3 by fulfilling her core commitments with Tessa, Mira, and Inez, ensuring contributor-free workflow protection, unconditional institutional worker remedies, and neighborhood witness safety while submitting her final ballot reflecting the human mantle and systemic labor reality.
